See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 96611 => 'Riyadh/Kharj', 96612 => 'Makkah/Jeddah', 96613 => 'Dammam/Khobar/Dahran', 96614 => 'Madenah/Arar/Tabuk/Yanbu', 96616 => 'Hail/Qasim', 96617 => 'Abha/Najran/Jezan', ];
